---
title: "Team Agency Mapping"
author: "Jacquline and Farida"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
```{r load}
library(readr)  
library(here)
install.packages("cfbfastR")
library(cfbfastR)

schedule_data <- cfbfastR::cfbd_schedule(year=2023)
crim_data<- read_csv('nibrs_offense_segment_2000_2005.csv')
batch_data <- read_csv('nibrs_batch_header_1991_2024.csv')


```
```{r}
install.packages("cfbfastR")

```
